description: The defendant person details for material relating to a defendant required to be matched with a defendant id provided by cps

title.description: Title by which a defendant is addressed

forename.description: The first given name of a defendant
forename.comments: Alphanumeric no consecutive spaces (i.e. a space can not appear adjacent to another space).

forename2.description: The second given name of a defendant
forename2.comments: Alphanumeric no consecutive spaces (i.e. a space can not appear adjacent to another space).

forename3.description: The third given name of a defendant
forename3.comments: Alphanumeric no consecutive spaces (i.e. a space can not appear adjacent to another space).

surname.comments: Alphanumeric no consecutive spaces (i.e. a space can not appear adjacent to another space).

dateOfBirth.description: The date when the defendant was born

cpsDefendantId.description: A unique reference to a defendant within a prosecution. Provided by cps when CPS are prosecuting the case
